// reporters: Tier2ReporterDecl.java.txt#InternalLog.logInternal
package com.consumer.x;

// JV008 negative: the tier-2 sink IS recognized (proving the declaration
// resolves), but its arguments are clean - a stop-word in the literal is prose,
// and the caught `e` carries no secret name. No finding.
class Jv008Tier2Clean {
    void reporterCleanArgs(Exception e) {
        InternalLog.logInternal("token refresh failed", e);
    }
}
